revision.text: The scale: parameter specifies the desired [[scale (map)|map scale]] as 1:''N'', overriding the scale implied by any [[#type:T|type:]] parameter. [[tswiki:GeoHack|GeoHack]] uses scale: to select a map scale for a 72 [[Dots per inch|dpi]] computer monitor. If no dim:, type:, or scale: parameters are provided, GeoHack uses its default scale of 1:300,000. {| class="wikitable" |+ Samples ! Subject ! Scale ! Markup ! Result |- |[[Big Ben]] |align=right|1:500 |{{coord|51.500611|N|0.124611|W|scale:500}} |{{coord|51.500611|N|0.124611|W|scale:500}} |- |[[Palace of Westminster]] |align=right|1:5,000 |{{coord|51.5006|N|0.1246|W|scale:5000}} |{{coord|51.5006|N|0.1246|W|scale:5000}} |- |[[City of Westminster]] |align=right|1:50,000 |{{coord|51.501|N|0.125|W|scale:50000}} |{{coord|51.501|N|0.125|W|scale:50000}} |- |[[Greater London]] |align=right|1:500,000 |{{coord|51.50|N|0.12|W|scale:500000}} |{{coord|51.50|N|0.12|W|scale:500000}} |} [[Category:WikiProject Geographical coordinates]]

The scale: parameter specifies the desired [[scale (map)|map scale]] as 1:''N'', overriding the scale implied by any [[#type:T|type:]] parameter. [[tswiki:GeoHack|GeoHack]] uses scale: to select a map scale for a 72 [[Dots per inch|dpi]] computer monitor. If no dim:, type:, or scale: parameters are provided, GeoHack uses its default scale of 1:300,000. {| class="wikitable" |+ Samples ! Subject ! Scale ! Markup ! Result |- |[[Big Ben]] |align=right|1:500 |{{coord|51.500611|N|0.124611|W|scale:500}} |{{coord|51.500611|N|0.124611|W|scale:500}} |- |[[Palace of Westminster]] |align=right|1:5,000 |{{coord|51.5006|N|0.1246|W|scale:5000}} |{{coord|51.5006|N|0.1246|W|scale:5000}} |- |[[City of Westminster]] |align=right|1:50,000 |{{coord|51.501|N|0.125|W|scale:50000}} |{{coord|51.501|N|0.125|W|scale:50000}} |- |[[Greater London]] |align=right|1:500,000 |{{coord|51.50|N|0.12|W|scale:500000}} |{{coord|51.50|N|0.12|W|scale:500000}} |} [[Category:WikiProject Geographical coordinates]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates

[[tswiki:GeoHack|GeoHack]] uses scale: to select a map scale for a 72 [[Dots per inch|dpi]] computer monitor. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting
revision.text: The scale: parameter specifies the desired [[scale (map)|map scale]] as 1:''N'', overriding the scale implied by any [[#type:T|type:]] parameter. [[tswiki:GeoHack|GeoHack]] uses scale: to select a map scale for a 72 [[Dots per inch|dpi]] computer monitor. If no dim:, type:, or scale: parameters are provided, GeoHack uses its default scale of 1:300,000. {| class="wikitable" |+ Samples ! Subject ! Scale ! Markup ! {{v|t|e|style=float: right|template=Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates/scale:}} The scale: parameter specifies the desired [[scale (map)|map scale]] as 1:''N'', overriding the scale implied by any [[#type:T|type:]] parameter. [[tswiki:GeoHack|GeoHack]] uses scale: to select a map scale for a 72 [[Dots per inch|dpi]] computer monitor. If no dim:, type:, or scale: parameters are provided, GeoHack uses its default scale of 1:300,000. {| class="wikitable" |+ Samples ! Subject ! Scale ! Markup ! revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=WikiProject_Geographical_coordinates%2Fscale%3A here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{v|t|e|style=float: right|template=Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates/scale:}} The scale: parameter specifies the desired [[scale (map)|map scale]] as 1:''N'', overriding the scale implied by any [[#type:T|type:]] parameter. [[tswiki:GeoHack|GeoHack]] uses scale: to select a map scale for a 72 [[Dots per inch|dpi]] computer monitor. If no dim:, type:, or scale: parameters are provided, GeoHack uses its default scale of 1:300,000. {| class="wikitable" |+ Samples ! Subject ! Scale ! Markup ! Result |- |[[Big Ben]] |align=right|1:500 |{{coord|51.500611|N|0.124611|W|scale:500}} |{{coord|51.500611|N|0.124611|W|scale:500}} |- |[[Palace of Westminster]] |align=right|1:5,000 |{{coord|51.5006|N|0.1246|W|scale:5000}} |{{coord|51.5006|N|0.1246|W|scale:5000}} |- |[[City of Westminster]] |align=right|1:50,000 |{{coord|51.501|N|0.125|W|scale:50000}} |{{coord|51.501|N|0.125|W|scale:50000}} |- |[[Greater London]] |align=right|1:500,000 |{{coord|51.50|N|0.12|W|scale:500000}} |{{coord|51.50|N|0.12|W|scale:500000}} |} [[Category:WikiProject Geographical coordinates]]
